overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a rainy urban city at night. The character navigates wet sidewalks and crosses streets while vehicles including police cars and taxis pass by. The environment features reflective wet pavement, street lighting, and a mix of residential and commercial buildings.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet urban sidewalk at night, passing rows of trash bins and a stone wall. A police car with flashing lights drives past on the left side of the street. The street is lined with apartment buildings and illuminated by street lamps.

events.description: yellow taxi cab drives past on the left side of the street
character steps off the sidewalk and crosses the wet street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street while walking toward a large corner building with illuminated windows

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving down the street with roof light illuminated

entered.detail: tall dark building with grid pattern of illuminated windows
yellow taxi cab with illuminated roof sign

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wet street at an intersection, passing a yellow taxi. The scene opens up to reveal a large corner building with many illuminated windows. The apartment buildings from the previous segment remain visible to the left while the trash bins fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk along tall office building

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a tall building and crossing another intersection

entered.detail: modern building with large grid-patterned windows emitting warm light
traffic signal pole with red light illuminated

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the sidewalk next to a tall office building with illuminated windows, then crosses another intersection. The corner building from the previous segment falls behind to the left while the traffic light becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial area with warehouse buildings and billboard

events.description: character enters a more open industrial area with warehouse architecture and chain-link fencing

metal chain-link fence surrounding industrial property
white sedan parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character crosses into a more open industrial area featuring warehouse buildings, a chain-link fence, and a large illuminated billboard in the distance. A white car is parked along the right side of the street as the architecture shifts from residential to industrial.

events.description: yellow taxi visible ahead waiting at the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past blue dumpsters toward an intersection with a taxi

notable_agents.action: taxi waiting at the intersection ahead with brake lights on

entered.detail: large blue industrial dumpster with graffiti on the side
yellow taxi at the intersection with illuminated brake lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the sidewalk past blue dumpsters, approaching an intersection where a taxi waits. The billboard remains visible in the distance to the left as the character nears the end of the block.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban environment that transitions from a residential neighborhood into a stark industrial district. It begins on a wet sidewalk lined with apartment buildings and trash bins, moving past a police car with flashing lights that streaks across the street. As the character crosses an intersection and passes a yellow taxi, the scene opens up to reveal a large corner building with glowing windows before shifting toward a tall office block and another street crossing. The architecture then gradually transforms from residential to industrial, moving past a chain-link fence and a parked white car toward a distant, illuminated billboard. Finally, the camera glides past blue dumpsters and a waiting taxi as the character nears the end of the block in the open warehouse area.
